abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Starling Bank Receiver can be configured.

user.description: Create a private, token-free receiver for Starling Bank V2 webhooks.
user.title: Starling Bank Receiver

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Starling. Try again shortly.
error.invalid_auth: Starling rejected the personal access token or a required read scope is missing.
error.invalid_public_key: The Starling webhook public key is not a valid PEM public key.

data.api_token: Personal access token (blank keeps the existing token)
data.webhook_public_key: Webhook public key (blank keeps the existing key)

init.description: Configure signed webhooks and optional read-only account data. The personal access token is stored only in Home Assistant and is used only for GET requests to account, balance, savings-goal, and space endpoints.
init.title: Configure Starling Bank
